_comment: Evergreen, vague headlines used only when both NewsAPI and DDG are unreachable. Keep timeless and inoffensive — they go straight into a live radio script.

items.headline: Music fans worldwide are streaming more than ever, with playlists dominating listening habits.
Researchers say a regular routine of short walks improves both mood and focus.
City planners around the world are experimenting with greener public spaces.
Scientists continue to discover new species in the deep ocean every year.
Independent artists are reaching global audiences through social platforms.
A new generation of small electric vehicles is reshaping urban commutes.
Libraries are quietly becoming community tech hubs in many cities.
Backyard gardening has surged in popularity since the pandemic.
Astronomers spotted a new comet that should be visible to the naked eye later this year.
A growing number of remote workers say they prefer hybrid schedules over fully remote ones.
